violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed cook put on gloves without washing his hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing. Vacuum sealed meats were found vacuum sealed in the walk-in cooler. Facility does not have an approved HACCP plan on file for vacuum sealing. An approved HACCP plan must be on file in order to vacuum seal foods. **Items vacuum sealed by facility should be discarded.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Commercial can opener blade was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
